markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review 2026 content strategy and demo the new AI visibility tool.](https://fathom.video/share/wbFDhPQR-brARxdbdKxxKYYVz16mY8JM?tab=summary&timestamp=50.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**New Content Strategy:** GrowthX proposed a 4-part strategy: 1) Refreshing existing content to leverage its authority, 2) Expanding the CS101 series into a competitor gap of \~150 keywords (500+ SV), 3) Using a new GA4 report to track organic's 38% contribution to conversions, and 4) Exploring a new Threat Actor Database.](https://fathom.video/share/wbFDhPQR-brARxdbdKxxKYYVz16mY8JM?tab=summary&timestamp=340.0)
  - [**CVE Localization Paused:** GrowthX recommended against localizing the CVE database, citing a competitor's poor UX and low traffic for non-English versions.](https://fathom.video/share/wbFDhPQR-brARxdbdKxxKYYVz16mY8JM?tab=summary&timestamp=694.0)
  - [**AI Tool Launched:** GrowthX demoed "Check That," a proprietary AI visibility tool for tracking performance against competitors across \~150 prompts. SentinelOne will receive access today.](https://fathom.video/share/wbFDhPQR-brARxdbdKxxKYYVz16mY8JM?tab=summary&timestamp=1204.0)
  - [**2025 CVEs Prioritized:** GrowthX will create a new list of 2025 CVEs with search volume, prioritizing recency over historical data.](https://fathom.video/share/wbFDhPQR-brARxdbdKxxKYYVz16mY8JM?tab=summary&timestamp=141.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy Recommendations

[GrowthX presented a 4-part strategy for 2026, based on SentinelOne's goals and partnership results.](https://fathom.video/share/wbFDhPQR-brARxdbdKxxKYYVz16mY8JM?tab=summary&timestamp=340.0)

1.  **Refresh Existing Content:**
    
      - [**Rationale:** A quick win. Refreshing existing content leverages its established authority and indexation for faster keyword gains.](https://fathom.video/share/wbFDhPQR-brARxdbdKxxKYYVz16mY8JM?tab=summary&timestamp=382.0)
      - [**Action:** SentinelOne to define a refresh approach (e.g., update stats, links, publish date) and select an initial batch for a calibration test.](https://fathom.video/share/wbFDhPQR-brARxdbdKxxKYYVz16mY8JM?tab=summary&timestamp=1034.0)

2.  **Expand CS101 Series:**
    
      - [**Rationale:** A competitor gap analysis found \~150 keywords with 500+ monthly search volume where S1 lacks a presence.](https://fathom.video/share/wbFDhPQR-brARxdbdKxxKYYVz16mY8JM?tab=summary&timestamp=488.0)
      - [**Action:** After the current topic runway, new CS101 content will target these keywords.](https://fathom.video/share/wbFDhPQR-brARxdbdKxxKYYVz16mY8JM?tab=summary&timestamp=529.0)

3.  **Improve Organic Attribution:**
    
      - [**Tool:** A new custom GA4 report tracks organic search touchpoints before key conversions, showing organic contributes to \~38% of events.](https://fathom.video/share/wbFDhPQR-brARxdbdKxxKYYVz16mY8JM?tab=summary&timestamp=549.0)
      - [**Action:** SentinelOne to define key GA4 events (forms, actions, importance) to help GrowthX prioritize content based on its conversion impact.](https://fathom.video/share/wbFDhPQR-brARxdbdKxxKYYVz16mY8JM?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)

4.  **Explore Threat Actor Database:**
    
      - [**Idea:** A new database, similar to the CVE model, to centralize threat actor info currently buried in blog posts.](https://fathom.video/share/wbFDhPQR-brARxdbdKxxKYYVz16mY8JM?tab=summary&timestamp=645.0)
      - [**Action:** GrowthX to research comps and scope the project. SentinelOne noted this would require collaboration with the Threat Intelligence team.](https://fathom.video/share/wbFDhPQR-brARxdbdKxxKYYVz16mY8JM?tab=summary&timestamp=1103.0)

### CVE Database Localization

  - [**Recommendation:** Do not localize the CVE database.](https://fathom.video/share/wbFDhPQR-brARxdbdKxxKYYVz16mY8JM?tab=summary&timestamp=694.0)
  - [**Rationale:** A competitor analysis (WIZ) showed poor UX and low traffic for non-English versions, with English pages always ranking higher.](https://fathom.video/share/wbFDhPQR-brARxdbdKxxKYYVz16mY8JM?tab=summary&timestamp=694.0)
  - [**SentinelOne's View:** Agrees with the recommendation, noting WIZ's localized pages are often not indexed by Google.](https://fathom.video/share/wbFDhPQR-brARxdbdKxxKYYVz16mY8JM?tab=summary&timestamp=759.0)

### AI Visibility Tool: "Check That"

  - [GrowthX demoed its new proprietary tool, "Check That," for monitoring AI visibility.](https://fathom.video/share/wbFDhPQR-brARxdbdKxxKYYVz16mY8JM?tab=summary&timestamp=1204.0)
  - [**Key Features:**](https://fathom.video/share/wbFDhPQR-brARxdbdKxxKYYVz16mY8JM?tab=summary&timestamp=1229.0)
      - [**Competitor Tracking:** Monitor visibility, position, sentiment, and citation share against up to 30 competitors.](https://fathom.video/share/wbFDhPQR-brARxdbdKxxKYYVz16mY8JM?tab=summary&timestamp=1251.0)
      - [**Prompt Analysis:** Track \~150 prompts, filterable by persona/stage, with platform-specific breakdowns to guide content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/wbFDhPQR-brARxdbdKxxKYYVz16mY8JM?tab=summary&timestamp=1290.0)
      - [**Source Identification:** See top cited domains and content formats (e.g., listicles) to identify new competitors and content opportunities.](https://fathom.video/share/wbFDhPQR-brARxdbdKxxKYYVz16mY8JM?tab=summary&timestamp=1466.0)
      - [**Shared Library:** Access pre-loaded prompts with historical data to get actionable insights immediately.](https://fathom.video/share/wbFDhPQR-brARxdbdKxxKYYVz16mY8JM?tab=summary&timestamp=1368.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/wbFDhPQR-brARxdbdKxxKYYVz16mY8JM?tab=summary&timestamp=1595.0)
      - [Create a new list of 2025 CVEs with search volume, prioritizing recency.](https://fathom.video/share/wbFDhPQR-brARxdbdKxxKYYVz16mY8JM?tab=summary&timestamp=141.0)
      - [Research Threat Actor Database comps and scope the project.](https://fathom.video/share/wbFDhPQR-brARxdbdKxxKYYVz16mY8JM?tab=summary&timestamp=1103.0)
      - [Grant SentinelOne access to the "Check That" tool.](https://fathom.video/share/wbFDhPQR-brARxdbdKxxKYYVz16mY8JM?tab=summary&timestamp=1545.0)
      - [Export the current prompt list from "Check That" to a spreadsheet for review.](https://fathom.video/share/wbFDhPQR-brARxdbdKxxKYYVz16mY8JM?tab=summary&timestamp=1351.0)
  - [**SentinelOne:**](https://fathom.video/share/wbFDhPQR-brARxdbdKxxKYYVz16mY8JM?tab=summary&timestamp=1588.0)
      - [Define key GA4 events (forms, actions, importance) for attribution tracking.](https://fathom.video/share/wbFDhPQR-brARxdbdKxxKYYVz16mY8JM?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
      - [Review content strategy recommendations, define a refresh approach, and select an initial batch.](https://fathom.video/share/wbFDhPQR-brARxdbdKxxKYYVz16mY8JM?tab=summary&timestamp=1034.0)
